perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in black pajamas and an older man in a grey t-shirt sit on a blue sofa in a living room. The woman holds a bright green bag of Doritos. (2) The camera zooms in on the snack bag, which features images of coriander leaves. The man points at the bag while talking. (3) They open the bag, and the woman shows a bright green triangular chip to the camera. (4) Both individuals take a chip and eat it simultaneously. The man chews thoughtfully while the woman looks on expectantly. (5) The woman holds a chip out towards the left side of the frame, off-camera, as if feeding someone else. (6) The man continues to eat multiple chips while talking to the woman, who eventually shows a score of 3.5 with her hands and text overlay.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo background music with electronic beats starts immediately. A young female voice and a middle-aged male voice are heard speaking enthusiastically in Korean. (2) The sound of a plastic snack bag being crinkled and torn open is clearly audible. (3) Rhythmic crunching sounds are heard as they begin eating the chips. (4) A high-pitched female voice from off-camera is heard screaming and shouting in a playful, disgusted manner. (5) The male voice continues speaking in a steady, calm tone while more crunching and laughter from the younger female occur. (6) Music fades slightly as they reach a conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top fixed text: "🇰🇷韓國爸爸吃🌿香菜多力多滋的反應" (Korean Dad's reaction to eating Coriander Doritos). (2) Functional text throughout translates Korean dialogue into Traditional Chinese. (3) Decorative labels appear: "(100% 韓國人)" (100% Korean), "是芥末!!!" (It's wasabi!!!), "是「香菜」" (It's "Coriander"). (4) Bold emphasis text: "超綠" (Super Green), "啊啊啊" (Aaaaah), "爸爸吃得很好..." (Dad eats very well...), "3.5", "(傻眼)" (Speechless/Dumbfounded).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to the product -> Speculating on flavor -> Opening and tasting -> Family reaction -> Final rating.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 middle-aged male (father) visible on camera; 1 female (mother) heard off-camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair wearing black button-down pajamas; a middle-aged man with glasses and short hair wearing a grey 'Under Armour' t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A blue fabric sofa with green and patterned cushions. A framed picture or certificate is hanging on the wall behind them.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut sync with visual edits

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to entertain viewers by showcasing a cross-generational reaction to a controversial food item (coriander-flavored chips). It leverages the comedic contrast between the father's unexpected enjoyment and the mother's intense off-camera disgust to drive engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features the brand packaging, discusses the specific flavor unique to a region (Taiwan), and provides a taste review.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Family reaction format, specifically targeting Korean speakers/culture while using Chinese subtitles for a broader Asian audience.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses 'reaction' tropes common in short-form content, such as dramatic text overlays and sound effects (the mother's scream) to emphasize the polarized reactions to the snack's flavor.
